name: Bunda Mulia School

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Lodan Raya No.2, Ancol, Pademangan, Jakarta Utara 14430, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Bunda Mulia is a sensible option for North Jakarta families who want a Cambridge-aligned primary and lower secondary education.
paragraphs: Parents say Bunda Mulia is a sensible option for North Jakarta families who want a Cambridge-aligned primary and lower secondary education.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$3.7K – US$6.2K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: North Jakarta campus, Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities.
